description: Dual-channel reasoning improves balance, BUT balance ≠ truth (false equivalence risk)
sources_in_conflict: ['Proposer/critic balance literature', 'False equivalence critique in epistemic ethics']
explanatory_variable: Task type: debate tasks benefit; asymmetric-evidence tasks are harmed
synthesis_caveat: Apply Dual-Channel only when both sides have substantial independent evidence; use Integrity Checker first

description: Binary guardrails are brittle under reframing (need escape hatch), BUT escape hatches create new injection surfaces
sources_in_conflict: ['arXiv:2506.08837 injection attack patterns', 'Paraconsistent escape hatch mechanism (P05)']
explanatory_variable: Whether action and reasoning channels are physically separated (DualAgentBoundary pattern)
synthesis_caveat: P05 is safe only when combined with securityboundary class decorators; do not deploy in isolation

description: Continuum refactoring improves nuance (P03), BUT some domains are genuinely binary (on/off, alive/dead)
explanatory_variable: Whether the domain has genuine intermediate states (empirical question per domain)
resolution_status: Preserved—run Integrity Checker (P01) first to determine
synthesis_caveat: P03 must follow P01; never apply refactoring before ME/JE test

description: More options surfaced (Coverage Gain) ≠ better epistemic quality (option proliferation proxy trap)
sources_in_conflict: ['Option-space coverage as success metric (DRP Section 10)', 'Option proliferation without depth (Reflexive Check)']
explanatory_variable: Whether options are accompanied by evidence depth or are vacuous enumeration
resolution_status: Preserved—requires separate depth metric alongside CG
synthesis_caveat: CG must be paired with evidence-depth scoring per option; raw count is a proxy trap

description: Paraconsistent framing holds P and ¬P simultaneously (L1 lens), BUT many LLM architectures are trained to converge to a single answer
explanatory_variable: Model family and training regime; frontier models with RLHF converge harder
resolution_status: Preserved—architecture-level gap, not resolvable by prompt alone
synthesis_caveat: Paraconsistent outputs require explicit schema enforcement (DCCDSchemaGuard) to prevent RLHF-driven convergence collapsing the both/and
